info.title: HL-MCK Automation Antidetect Browser API
info.description:
[http://localhost:4000/docs/json](http://localhost:4000/docs/json)

REST API for browser profile management and automation. Access Swagger UI at /docs.

post.summary: Create a new profile
Launch browser for a profile
Close browser for a profile

get.summary: Check if browser is running for a profile

post.summary: Execute any Playwright Page method

get.summary: List tasks, optionally filtered by profileId

post.summary: Create a new automation task

profileId.description: ID of the profile to run the task on

scriptType.description: file = path to script file, inline = script string

scriptContent.description: Script file path or inline script

post.summary: Enqueue a task for execution
Cancel a queued or running task
Create a new proxy

get.summary: List proxies not assigned to any profile

post.summary: Assign a proxy to a profile
Unassign proxy from a profile (returns proxy to pool)
Create a new script

headless.description: Run in headless mode when triggered by cron

cronProfileId.description: Profile ID to use for cron-triggered runs

post.description: Scripts receive page, context, profileId, and log(msg) globals when executed. Optionally schedule with a cron expression.

delete.summary: Delete a script and cancel its cron job

post.summary: Generate a fingerprint preview (not saved)
post.description: Returns a generated fingerprint config without persisting it. Useful for previewing before applying.

post.summary: Generate and save a fingerprint for a profile

put.summary: Save a manually-edited fingerprint config for a profile
put.description: Persists the provided fingerprint config directly without regenerating.

post.summary: Navigate to a URL
Reload the current page
Navigate back
Navigate forward

get.summary: Get current URL and page title

post.summary: Take a screenshot (returns base64 PNG)
Click an element
Double-click an element
Hover over an element
Focus an element
Clear and fill a form field
Type text into an element (char by char, human-like)
Press a keyboard key (e.g. Enter, Tab, Escape)
Select an option in a <select> element
Check or uncheck a checkbox
Scroll the page or scroll element into view
Tap an element (mobile touch simulation)
Drag from one element to another
Dispatch a DOM event on an element (e.g. 'click', 'input', 'change')
Resize the browser viewport
Set full page HTML content (replaces current page)
Wait for next page navigation to complete
Wait until a selector appears in the DOM
Wait until page URL matches a pattern (string or glob)
Get innerText of an element
Get an attribute value from an element
Get value of an input/textarea/select element
Get innerHTML of an element
Evaluate a JavaScript expression in the page context
Run an inline automation script

get.summary: Get cookies for the browser context

post.summary: Add cookies to the browser context

delete.summary: Clear all cookies from the browser context

post.summary: Check if an element is visible (no waiting)
Check if an element is hidden or not in DOM (no waiting)
Check if a checkbox or radio button is checked
Check if an element is enabled (not disabled)
Check if an element is disabled
Check if an element is editable (not readonly or disabled)
Get textContent of an element (includes hidden text)
Pause for a fixed duration (ms)
Wait for page to reach a load state
Set extra HTTP headers for all subsequent requests
Inject a script to run before every page load
Hold a key down (for modifier combos)
Release a held key
Type text char-by-char (no element focus needed — use page.focus first)
Insert text instantly without simulating keystrokes
Click at absolute page coordinates
Move mouse to page coordinates
Double-click at absolute page coordinates
Press and hold a mouse button
Release a held mouse button
Scroll by delta via mouse wheel

get.summary: Export context storage state (cookies + localStorage) for session reuse

post.summary: Open a new page/tab in the browser context

get.summary: List all open pages/tabs in the browser context

post.summary: Set extra HTTP headers for all pages in the context
Grant browser permissions (e.g. geolocation, camera, microphone)
Revoke all previously granted browser permissions
Override GPS geolocation for the browser context

tags.name: browser-actions
tags.description: Full Playwright API over REST: navigation, clicks, keyboard, mouse, waits, evaluate, cookies, screenshots, context operations

tags.name: proxies
tags.description: Proxy pool management and profile assignment

tags.name: scripts
tags.description: Script library with optional cron scheduling
